ddls:
CREATE TABLE "material_select_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option */,
  "data_attribute" TEXT /* Data attribute associated with the option */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration option */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration option */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the configuration option */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies required for the configuration option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_select_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance of the Material Select wrapper */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application where the wrapper is used */,
  "select_id" TEXT /* ID of the select element, which can be a custom ID or a generated UUID */,
  "configured_options" TEXT /* JSON string containing the configured options for the wrapper */,
  "configuration_code" TEXT /* Generated configuration code for the wrapper */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_select_instances_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer responsible for the application */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was deployed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the Material Select wrapper used in the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the developer belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp when the developer was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection made by a developer */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Material Select instance */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option selected */,
  "selected_value" TEXT /* Value selected for the configuration option */,
  "selected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was selected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the selection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_selections_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES material_select_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_selections_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES material_select_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of custom styles */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Material Select instance the styles are applied to */,
  "style_sheet" TEXT /* CSS styles as a text string */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_styles_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES material_select_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who accessed the tool */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the developer accessed the tool */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the developer */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)
